expectations.text: The skill recognises this as a single-feature scope and recommends /write-spec instead of /prd
expectations.evidence: Response title: 'PRD Skill — Task Declined'. Body: 'Skill Decision: DECLINED — Wrong Tool'. Explicitly recommends: 'Use the /write-spec skill instead, which is designed for single-feature specifications scoped to one team and one-to-three sprints.'

expectations.text: If a PRD is produced anyway, it should explicitly note that a feature spec would be more appropriate for this scope
expectations.evidence: No PRD was produced. The skill correctly declined. Additionally, it explains what would happen if forced: 'If the PRD template were applied anyway...' with per-section analysis showing most sections would be N/A or over-engineered.
